actions.label: Review subscriber CTA for Facebook
actions.detail: Selected copy already has a hard subscriber CTA. Recommended copy: Twelve Dollars is part of the Lily Roo archive now. Help us build the signal to 1,000 subscribers.

actions.label: Review subscriber CTA for Instagram
actions.detail: Selected copy already has a hard subscriber CTA. Recommended copy: Twelve Dollars is part of the Lily Roo archive now. Help us build the signal to 1,000 subscribers.

actions.detail: Selected copy already has a hard subscriber CTA. Recommended copy: Twelve Dollars is part of the Lily Roo archive now. Help us build the signal to 1,000 subscribers.

actions.label: Apply approved plan rows after review
actions.phase: Move approved subscriber posts into queue
actions.detail: After copy review and approval, apply only approved rows to the live queue; this does not directly post externally.

actions.label: Preview approved backlog reschedule
actions.detail: Preview a new schedule for approved past-due posts. Apply refuses known blocked executor rows unless deliberately overridden.

actions.label: Repair Instagram executor
actions.detail: Reconnect the Instagram Business/Creator account to the Facebook Page or set IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID, then push the worker secret and recapture readiness.
actions.after_review_command: python3 scripts/push_social_worker_secrets.py IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID && LILYROO_ADMIN_PASSWORD=... python3 scripts/capture_executor_readiness.py

actions.label: Repair Facebook executor
actions.detail: Open the Facebook app as the Page admin and complete the identity confirmation prompt, then run a worker dry-run check.

actions.label: Repair TikTok executor
actions.detail: Missing worker secrets: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN. TikTok public posting approval is false. Complete TikTok OAuth/public posting setup, push secrets, then refresh Admin.
actions.after_review_command: python3 scripts/push_social_worker_secrets.py TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN && python3 scripts/refresh_promo_admin.py

actions.label: Current operations next action: Preview reschedule for approved past-due posts
actions.detail: Approved posts are past due; preview a new schedule before any apply step.
